title: epipactis latifolia
intro: Epipactis latifolia, also known as broad-leaved helleborine, is a perennial orchid species native to Europe and parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and prevent platelet aggregation, making it a potential treatment for cardiovascular diseases. The health benefits of Epipactis latifolia include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve immune function, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of Epipactis latifolia typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and rhizomes, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal purposes.
